name: higher_education_governance_heat_dome_kestrel_lib_eq
premise: A Higher Education Governance response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving higher education governance heat dome kestrel lib eq. agents.name: Amina Hughes

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Amina Hughes must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Amina Hughes do?
